purpose: Final palm sensor coordinate grid with incomplete horizontal/vertical lines removed.

fields.row_col: clean final complete-grid coordinates, row-major from wrist side to finger side and left to right in +X
fields.center_x_y_z: cell center sampled on the palm/front surface
fields.c0_c1_c2_c3: four square cell corner coordinates sampled on source surface
fields.source_quad_id: original mesh/source quad used for projection back to hand0423g
